query:
SELECT vp.id, vp.employeeId, e.nomeCompleto, e.salarioBase, e.dataAdmissao,
  vp.periodoAquisitivoInicio, vp.periodoAquisitivoFim, vp.periodoConcessivoFim,
  vp.dataInicio, vp.dataFim, vp.diasGozo, vp.status, vp.vencida, vp.pagamentoEmDobro,
  vp.valorFerias, vp.valorTercoConstitucional, vp.valorTotal,
  vp.dataPagamento, vp.observacoes
FROM vacation_periods vp
JOIN employees e ON e.id = vp.employeeId
WHERE e.nomeCompleto LIKE '%MAURICIO BENEDITO%'
AND vp.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY vp.periodoAquisitivoInicio;

  vp.dataInicio, vp.dataFim, vp.diasGozo, vp.status, vp.vencida, vp.pagamentoEmDobro,
  vp.valorFerias, vp.valorTercoConstitucional, vp.valorTotal,
  vp.dataPagamento, vp.observacoes
FROM vacation_periods vp
JOIN employees e ON e.id = vp.employeeId
WHERE e.nomeCompleto LIKE '%MAURICIO BENEDITO%'
AND vp.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY vp.periodoAquisitivoInicio;
